entities.name: RESEARCH EVALUATION AND IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A process used to quantify the impact of research products, improve research planning and priority setting, develop decision-support systems, and establish accountability with donors

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization implementing research evaluation and impact assessment

entities.name: RESEARCH PLANNING
entities.description: The process of setting priorities and allocating limited research resources

entities.name: RESEARCH PRODUCTS
entities.description: The outputs of research that are delivered to final clientele

entities.name: INFORMATION AND DECISION-SUPPORT SYSTEM
entities.description: A system designed to assist scientists and research managers in making informed decisions

entities.name: IMPACT INDICATORS
entities.description: Metrics used to evaluate the outcomes and effects of research activities

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC FACTORS
entities.description: Social and economic variables that are relevant to the evaluation of research impact

entities.name: WORKPLANS
entities.description: Structured plans recommended for the implementation of research evaluation and impact assessment

entities.name: RESEARCH INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Public and private organizations engaged in scientific research

entities.name: SEED SECTOR
entities.description: The industry involved in the production and distribution of seeds
